title: Koeleria kangdingensis
taxonomy: Koeleria kangdingensis is classified as a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Koeleria, which consists of perennial grasses. This species is native to the Qinghai-Tibetan Plateau in China. The classification of Koeleria kangdingensis is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Monocots, Order: Poales, Family: Poaceae, Genus: Koeleria, Species: K. kangdingensis. Further research may provide more specific details about this species.
uses: Koeleria kangdingensis is a grass species native to the Sichuan province in China. Research suggests that this plant has potential medicinal uses due to its bioactive compounds.
